summary: Build 211 is a LOCAL-ONLY packet that CAPTURES Jason's fresh, signed, per-attempt approval for ONE Jason-operated controlled live roofer SMS send using Build 210 selected variant R1 (new_lead_fast_response_alert). It records approval_signed=true and approval_granted=true together with the exact approved scope (one SMS, SMS-only, no retry, no homeowner contact, no live automation activation, no unrestricted launch, no production data, destination entered silently outside repo/chat/logs, secrets/phone numbers not recorded, send-time preflight required, approval expires after one attempt whether sent or failed). It records the next decision packet (R1_SIGNED_APPROVAL_CAPTURED_SEND_TIME_PREFLIGHT_REQUIRED, recommended_next_option=run_send_time_preflight_before_one_jason_operated_sms_attempt, authorizes_send_now=false) and a fail-closed send-time preflight checklist. This build performs NO live action: no SMS, no Twilio, no Twilio client, no messages.create, no network/external call, no retry, no roofer/homeowner contact, no confirm-token arming, and reads/records NO secret values, SIDs, tokens, credential values, phone numbers, or production data. Capturing approval does NOT send. The immediate next step is a send-time preflight before any one Jason-operated SMS attempt. Launch remains pilot-gated, NOT unrestricted. Safety posture preserved: demo_ready_with_live_automation_disabled.

signed_approval_capture_evidence.selected_variant_text: RoofLeadHQ: New roofing lead just came in. A quick first reply now helps you reach them while they're still looking. Reply STOP to opt out.
signed_approval_capture_evidence.exact_approval_statement_text: I, Jason Lohse, approve one Jason-operated controlled live roofer SMS send using Build 210 selected variant R1 only: "RoofLeadHQ: New roofing lead just came in. A quick first reply now helps you reach them while they're still looking. Reply STOP to opt out." Scope: one SMS only, SMS-only, no retry, no homeowner contact, no live automation activation, no unrestricted launch, no production data, no secrets/phone numbers recorded in repo/chat/logs, destination entered silently outside repo/chat/logs, send-time preflight required before any attempt, and approval expires after one attempt whether sent or failed.
signed_approval_capture_evidence.approval_capture_notes: This captures Jason's fresh, per-attempt signed approval for exactly ONE Jason-operated, SMS-only live roofer send of variant R1. Capturing the approval does NOT send anything and does NOT arm any confirm token. A send-time preflight is required before any attempt. The approval is single-use and expires after one attempt whether the send succeeds or fails. No secret values, SIDs, tokens, phone numbers, or production data are recorded by capturing this approval.

send_time_preflight_checklist.purpose: Fail-closed send-time preflight checklist Jason would follow OUTSIDE this build, AFTER this captured approval and BEFORE any one Jason-operated SMS attempt. This build performs none of these steps. No secret values, phone numbers, SIDs, or tokens are read or recorded here.

homeowner_facing_copy_boundary.note: This approval is for one roofer-facing R1 SMS only. No homeowner-facing message is approved, consented, or to be sent. Any homeowner-facing message requires separate, explicit consent capture and a separate signed approval.
